description: deep-loop Claude and Codex compact safety net — emit-only artifact-only checkpoint preserves workstream affinity; legacy handoff unattended continuation is deferred to the measured driveHeadless driver.

hooks.command: node -e "const{join}=require('node:path');const{pathToFileURL}=require('node:url');const r=process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT||process.env.PLUGIN_ROOT;if(!r){console.error('deep-loop: plugin root unavailable')}else{import(pathToFileURL(join(r,'scripts','hooks-impl','precompact-handoff.mjs')).href).then(m=>m.main()).catch(()=>console.error('deep-loop: precompact hook failed'))}"

node -e "const{join}=require('node:path');const{pathToFileURL}=require('node:url');const r=process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT||process.env.PLUGIN_ROOT;if(!r){console.error('deep-loop: plugin root unavailable')}else{import(pathToFileURL(join(r,'scripts','hooks-impl','sessionstart-restore.mjs')).href).then(m=>m.main()).catch(()=>console.error('deep-loop: sessionstart hook failed'))}"
